cc:Work.dc:title: Shelf - DisplayShelf
cc:Work.dc:description:
Shelf with slanted floors
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes DisplayShelf --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --sx=73:36:36:36:73 --y=100 --h=60 --outside=0 --outside=1 --num=1 --front_wall_height=20.0 --angle=30.0 --include_back=0 --include_back=1 --include_front=0 --include_bottom=0 --include_bottom=1 --slope_top=0 --divider_wall_height=20.0 --bottom_distance=0 --top_distance=0.0 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --qr_code=1 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes DisplayShelf --sx=73:36:36:36:73 --h=60 --num=1 --include_back=0 --include_back=1 --include_bottom=0 --include_bottom=1 --qr_code=0 --qr_code=1 --spacing=0.5 Url:
